dataSources.title: External Data Source Connectivity
dataSources.subtitle: None of the 4 authoritative sources support CORS, so the backend (/admin/datasources) probes them and returns status, latency and sampled data.
dataSources.loadError: Failed to load source list (is the backend on :8787 running?)

rules.title: Scoring & Labelling Rules (Guideline-based)
rules.subtitle: These 6 authoritative guidelines are rule sources, not databases: what each one is, which NutriKids rule it becomes, and how to implement it.

models.title: Scoring Models
models.subtitle: Three complementary roles: Nutri-Score grades, NRF ranks, FDA Healthy badges — all alongside the 4-dimension personalised score.

recommendation.sourcesText: USDA FoodData Central, EFSA, PubMed, peer-reviewed studies, and verified manufacturer data.

nutrition.exposureSubtitle: Potential ingredients to be aware of
nutrition.allergenSubtitle: Check for common allergens in this product

home.title: NutriKids
home.subtitle: Smart nutrition guidance for growing kids
home.feature1Desc: Scan or search any food for a personalized nutrition score
home.feature2Desc: Evidence-based nutrition knowledge for child development
home.feature3Desc: Tailored nutrition plans for each child

feedback.title: Share Your Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help us make NutriKids better for you and your child.

q1.label: 1. Has NutriKids helped you make better food choices for your child?

q2.label: 2. How easy is it to understand the information shown on screen?
q2.1: 🎓 Too professional — too much jargon, hard to follow
q2.2: 🙂 Mostly understandable — I can follow most of it
q2.3: ✅ Easy to understand — clear and intuitive
q2.4: 📊 Charts and data aren't clear enough — too dense or hard to read
q2.5: ✨ Visuals are a bit distracting — animations or graphics pull focus

q3.label: 3. Which feature did you find most useful?

q4.label: 4. Which feature would you most like NutriKids to add next?

q5.label: 5. How likely are you to recommend NutriKids to other parents?

q6.label: 6. Any other thoughts or suggestions for us?
q6.placeholder: Tell us what you think… we read every response 💜

feedback.successMsg:
Your feedback means the world to us.
We'll use it to make NutriKids even better for you and your child 💜
